large circular fixture icon at the bottom-left of the room (possibly a floor-mounted basin or squat-type fixture), no text label legible on the icon itself

warnings: This sheet (SN-08) contains 4 views total: 3 bathroom plan details (ห้องน้ำ 1, 2, 3 -- printed in that left-to-right, top-to-bottom order) plus a fixture pipe-size schedule table -- same 4-view layout style as house #4's equivalent SN-07 sheet, just shifted to SN-08 on this house because of the extra roof-plan sheet (SN-07) inserted before it.

This is a small-scale (1:50) schematic underfloor-piping detail of ground-floor ห้องน้ำ 1, explicitly noted '( ท่อประปาเดินใต้พื้น )' -- underfloor routing, matching this house's ground-floor plan (page52) room level (+0.50).

The large circular fixture icon at bottom-left is not clearly identifiable (could be a floor-mounted basin, a hose-bib apron, or another fixture type) -- described by shape/position only, not guessed at as a specific fixture type.

Exact fixture layout and precise pipe routing paths are only partially legible at this resolution -- positions and pipe-size callouts are best-effort, not measured coordinates; flagged for zoom-review.
grid_ref_is_free_text_not_grid_notation is correctly true -- this is not on the building's structural plan grid.
